turns.speaker: D
turns.text: patient mrn : abc123 . date of birth : january 1st , 1960 . the patient is a 60 year old , right-handed male , referred today for evaluation of numbness and tingling . hello , mr. cook . how is mr. cook doing this morning ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: hi , dr. martinez . this weekend was a bit rough . mr. cook has had this numbness and tingling for a few weeks now .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so the numbness and tingling is in both of mr. cook's hands ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes , ever since mr. cook's car wreck last december when mr. cook broke mr. cook's wrists ... well , once mr. cook's wrists healed , mr. cook noticed the numbness and tingling more , the tingling and the numbness .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and does mr. cook still wear the splint only on the right wrist ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , mr. cook also wears the left splint sometimes . the right wrist is just worse , but the splint helps . both wrists have really gotten worse over the last month . when mr. cook broke both wrists , mr. cook's right wrist was definitely in worse shape . mr. cook has also been having some s- mild stiffness in mr. cook's neck too . mr. cook hit mr. cook's head during the accident , and the emergency clinicians told mr. cook the head injury was a contusion .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and where would mr. cook say the tingling and numbness is ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: on this side , the tingling and numbness goes from here and here up to about here . on the other side , the tingling and numbness is from here to here .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: mr. cook sees . so on the right side , mr. cook is pointing from the middle and ring finger , all the way up the forearm . and on the left , the symptoms extend from the pinky and ring finger . and is there any pain or just tingling and numbness ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: eh , the symptoms are mainly just sore . sometimes mr. cook's wrists throb , but overall , mr. cook's wrists feel weaker too , especially when mr. cook is using mr. cook's wrists . the tingling happens more when mr. cook's wrists hurt , but when the wrist pain goes away , the tingling is dull .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and when does mr. cook feel these symptoms ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: well , really , mr. cook guesses the symptoms occur more so at night , and the symptoms come and go throughout the day .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and does mr. cook experience any loss of sensation in mr. cook's hands or fingers ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: like , feeling something ? no , not that mr. cook can really think of . though , in general , mr. cook's hands and fingers may be less sensitive than mr. cook's hands and fingers should be , but mr. cook can still feel . the prior clinicians also gave mr. cook some nerve pain medicine , but mr. cook has n't been taking the nerve pain medicine like mr. cook should .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and is mr. cook still on the coreg for hypertension and the lexapro for anxiety ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes , mr. cook is still taking coreg and lexapro . mr. cook had prediabetes too , but mr. cook got prediabetes under control by changing mr. cook's diet .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and no history of thyroid issues , correct ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: nope .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right , thank you , mr. cook . okay , first , dr. martinez will go over mr. cook's review of systems . mr. cook should correct dr. martinez if dr. martinez is wrong in any of the review of systems . constitutional , mr. cook has fatigue and weight gain ; gi , mr. cook has excessive appetite and bloating ; eyes have floaters ; cardiovascular shows shortness of breath and leg swelling ; endocrine , mr. cook is always hungry ; skin , mr. cook has some nail bed changes , dryness , itching ; musculoskeletal , mr. cook has gout and muscle pain . and the remainder of the review of systems is negative .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yep , the review of systems is all correct .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right , dr. martinez is going to go ahead and do the neurologic examination . let's look at the right hand first . can mr. cook feel this ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , but a little less on these two fingers .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: sensation is normal , except pin prick sensation diminished in third and fourth fingers on the right . and how about on the left ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um , yeah , but these two a little less .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: sensation is decreased in the fourth and fifth fingers on the left okay , let's test mr. cook's reflexes now . reflexes are 1+ and symmetric ; 2+ knees ; toes are downgoing bilaterally . all right , dr. martinez is going to tap on mr. cook's right wrist . does mr. cook feel anything ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , the tapping feels like a zing up mr. cook's wrist and something into mr. cook's elbow too .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and how about the left side ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , the tapping feels the same on the left side too .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: tinel sign positive at both wrists and both elbows . rest of exam is normal . all right , so what dr. martinez is seeing today is bilateral carpal tunnel syndrome or , potentially , bilateral cubital tunnel syndrome . however , mr. cook's symptom presentation suggests bilateral carpal syndrome , as the nerve in mr. cook's wrists is aggravated by mr. cook's past trauma . the aggravated nerve in mr. cook's wrists is causing the pain and tingling mr. cook was describing to dr. martinez .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay , so how do mr. cook and dr. martinez make the symptoms better ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: first , dr. martinez wants to determine exactly where the nerve irritation is coming from . dr. martinez and mr. cook will need to schedule mr. cook for a nerve test , which is called an emg test . the emg test clinicians will measure the responsiveness of mr. cook's nerves to truly pinpoint where mr. cook is having mr. cook's issues .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: that sounds fine to mr. cook .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: great . after the emg test is complete , mr. cook can return here for a follow-up visit . if mr. cook is still having symptoms , dr. martinez and mr. cook can consider a referral to dr. martinez's hand clinic , possibly for injections or carpal tunnel release se- surgery . dr. martinez could also refer mr. cook ... dr. martinez and mr. cook could also refer mr. cook to an orthopedist for the same treatment .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sounds good , dr. martinez .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right , mr. cook should keep wearing mr. cook's splints , and dr. martinez will see mr. cook after the emg test studies .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: thank you .
